name: PCM5122
description: The `pcm5122` platform allows your ESPHome devices to use the PCM5122 high-performance stereo audio DAC. This allows the playback of audio via the microcontroller from a range of sources via [Speaker](https://esphome.io/components/speaker/) or [Media Player](https://esphome.io/components/media_player/).

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the device. Defaults to `0x4D`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the [I²C bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) the PCM5122 is connected to.

config_entries.label: Bits Per Sample
config_entries.description: The bit depth of the audio samples. One of `16bit`, `24bit`, or `32bit`. Defaults to `16bit`.
